# IPTV UK Subscription — iptvuksubscription.uk

## About
IPTV UK Subscription is the UK's #1 premium IPTV streaming service. We provide over 30,000 live TV channels, 50,000+ movies and TV shows on demand, all in Full HD and 4K quality with 99.9% uptime.

## Services
- **Monthly Plan**: £9.99/mo — 30,000+ channels, Full HD & 4K, 1 device, 24/7 support
- **Annual Plan**: £59/yr — Everything in Monthly + 2 devices, priority support, 50,000+ VOD library (Most Popular)
- **Family Plan**: £129.99/yr — Everything in Annual + 4 devices, VIP support

## Key Features
- 30,000+ live TV channels including all major UK channels (BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Sky Sports, BT Sport)
- Full Premier League, Champions League, and international sports coverage
- 50,000+ movies and TV shows on demand
- 4K Ultra HD streaming quality
- 99.9% uptime guarantee
- Compatible with Smart TV, Firestick, Android, iOS, Windows, Mac, MAG Box, Apple TV, Roku, Chromecast
- EPG (Electronic Programme Guide) included
- Instant activation via WhatsApp

## Content Categories
- UK Sports & Reality
- UK Drama
- Trending Movies
- Kids & Family
- International TV
- News & Documentaries

## Technical
- Built with Next.js, deployed on Vercel
- UK-focused (.uk TLD) with en-GB localisation
- Exact Match Domain for "IPTV UK Subscription"
